meta.title: Using Ecodata
meta.description: Step-by-step guidance for finding, previewing, and exporting the right indicators for research.

hero.title: Using Ecodata
hero.subtitle: A practical guide that takes users from login, source filtering, indicator selection, and data preview to exporting reproducible research datasets.

steps.title: Login
steps.description: Sign in to use workspace features, AI Chat, Econometrics, and export permissions tied to your plan.

steps.title: Filter and Select
steps.description: Filter by source, topic, country, province, frequency, year range, and completeness before choosing indicators.

steps.title: Preview
steps.description: Inspect sample data, metadata, coverage, units, methodology, and citation details.

steps.title: Export
steps.description: Download a scoped dataset with metadata so the research workflow can be reproduced.

sources.title: Data source map
sources.description: The documentation reorganizes current Ecodata sources and indicators into global data, Vietnam data, survey data, customs trade, stock market, and analysis tools.

items.title: World Bank, IMF, OECD, Eurostat, ILO, FAO, WTO, ADB
items.description: International indicators for cross-country comparison, panel data, macroeconomics, and development research.

items.title: GSO, NGTK, KTXH, VHLSS aggregate
items.description: Official Vietnam statistics by year, province, indicator group, and source report.

items.title: Vietnam Customs
items.description: Import and export values by commodity, partner country, province, transport mode, and reporting period.

items.title: Macro Survey and VHLSS Micro
items.description: PCI, PAPI, ICT, PAR, SIPAS, and the VHLSS microdata Variable Hub.

items.title: Stock Hub
items.description: Prices, symbols, financial statements, notes, and corporate events for Vietnam stocks.

items.title: AI Chat and Econometrics
items.description: Use AI to narrow the indicator set, then run preliminary models before exporting data.

tools.title: From research question to reproducible data
tools.description: The new articles focus on practical in-app workflows. Users can use AI Chat to narrow indicator choices, Econometrics to test preliminary relationships, then export data and metadata.

items.title: AI Chat for indicator selection
items.description: Suggest dependent variables, explanatory variables, data sources, and coverage checks.

items.title: Econometrics model checks
items.description: OLS, WLS, GLS, panel, VAR, ARIMA, Logit, and Probit for quick screening.

items.title: Preview and Export
items.description: Check sample data, download permissions, export format, and metadata before analysis.
